checks.description: Save buttons confirm edits; form inputs respond to standard keyboard interaction
Icon picker dismissable by clicking outside; Cancel button on editors
Error messages shown inline for invalid coordinates and duplicate location names; invalid schedule rows highlighted red
Focus does not jump unexpectedly during simulation or editing
Activity text input has autocomplete with previously used activities
+ Add Event button placed in schedule editor header, always visible
Top bar with date/time and controls remains stable during simulation playback
Schedule rows show hover state and are clickable to enter edit mode
Save button consistently saves current editor state
Schedule events auto-sorted chronologically on every edit
After saving or cancelling edits, focus remains on appropriate element
